violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked (eggs, burgers, steak, lox salmon, benedicts). New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
The ceiling in the basement area above the 3-bay sink and the prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Cans of coca cola and water bottles were observed submerged into the ice well that is used for consumption. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2023

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Several menu items of animal origin are served raw or undercooked or contain foods of animal origin that are raw or undercooked. Place an asterisk (*) next to each of the items on the menu and put a written consumer advisory on the bottom of the menu. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Sausages/broccoli were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep and covered. The items were moved to shallow pans and in the freezer to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2023

The food prep sink in the basement is lacking an air gap. Providing an air gap between the water supply outlet and the flood level rim of a plumbing fixture or equipment prevents contamination that may be caused by backflow New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
